case_title: DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. VS. CARLOS GONZALEZ

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$55.00) SERVED SEP-21-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, CARLOS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-30-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-30-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM BETSY JOHNSEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY ELIZABETH LOPEZ--LEGAL ASSISTANT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-30-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, CARLOS $1,381.51 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,466.51 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.
RETURNED MAIL SENT TO CARLOS GONZALEZ OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED RETURN TO SENDER-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED-UNABLE TO FORWARD
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,381.51 FILED BY DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, CARLOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-30-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
